steps.title: Read the underlined sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports that Allan and colleagues published a study concluding that ocean acidification strongly affects the behavior of Pomacentrus amboinensis. The key word is concluding.

steps.title: Reject later or absent details
steps.content: Choice A refers to the later criticism about sample size, not the underlined sentence. Choice B invents a list of fish traits. Choice C invents a location detail.

steps.title: State the sentence function
steps.content: Choice D accurately describes the underlined sentence because it states the conclusion Allan and colleagues reached in their 2013 study. The answer is D.
